Preference.android:title: Managed by your organisation
Preference.android:summary: Audit logging is controlled by your IT administrator via MDM policy. Some settings below may be locked.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Enable Audit Logging
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Record security-relevant events: auth, commands, file transfers, port forwards. Default: OFF for privacy.

EditTextPreference.android:title: Max Log Size (MB)
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Oldest entries are pruned when this limit is reached

EditTextPreference.android:title: Retention (days)
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Entries older than this are deleted automatically. MDM policy overrides this value when set.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Terminal Commands
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Record every command typed in a session

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Command Output
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Record terminal output — significantly increases log size

Preference.android:title: Authentication, host keys, SFTP, port forwards
Preference.android:summary: These security events are always recorded when audit logging is on

Preference.android:title: Export Audit Log
Preference.android:summary: Save as CSV or JSON for external review

Preference.android:title: Clear All Audit Entries
Preference.android:summary: Delete all audit log entries — cannot be undone
